about.title: Why Moeen?
about.subtitle: Moeen is the first smart legal assistant specialized in Egyptian law. We use the latest AI technologies to provide accurate and fast legal consultations, saving you time, effort, and cost.

interactiveDemo.title: Designed specifically for your legal expertise
interactiveDemo.description: Offload complex tasks using natural language to your personal assistant specialized in Egyptian law. Moeen understands legal context and provides accurate, detailed answers.
interactiveDemo.typedText:
Contract Analysis:

• Duration: One year renewable
• Rent: 3000 EGP monthly
• Deposit: Two months in advance
• Maintenance responsibility: Owner

videoDemo.title: Designed for Professionals
videoDemo.subtitle: Smart AI-powered legal assistant for lawyers and businesses

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Clear answers to the questions people usually ask before using Moeen.
faq.supportText: Start a chat and ask Moeen about your situation in plain language.

items.question: Is Moeen a replacement for a lawyer?
items.answer: No. Moeen helps you understand legal information, organize questions, and explore possible next steps. For formal legal advice, court matters, or binding decisions, you should consult a licensed lawyer.

items.question: Is Moeen specialized in Egyptian law?
items.answer: Yes. Moeen is designed around Egyptian legal context, including legal terminology, common procedures, and government process guidance.

items.question: What can I ask the assistant?
items.answer: You can ask legal questions, request explanations of terms, summarize legal topics, prepare questions for a lawyer, or understand the steps and documents needed for common procedures.

items.question: Can I use legal terminology and government process tools?
items.answer: Yes. Logged-in users can access the legal terminology tool and the government process guide from the header tools menu.

items.question: Are answers based on sources?
items.answer: When sources are available, Moeen shows them so you can review the original reference. You should still verify critical information before taking official action.

items.question: Do I need an account to start?
items.answer: You can explore the landing page without an account. To use the assistant and saved tools, you need to sign in or create an account.

footer.disclaimer: This service provides legal information and assistance, not formal legal advice. Please consult a licensed attorney for formal matters.

header.title: Legal Terminologies Explained
